data.title: Ping An Assisted First Batch of Corporate Clients to Evacuate from Middle East's Conflict Zones
data.description: On March 5, 2026 in Hong Kong and Shanghai, Ping An Insurance (Group) Company of China, Ltd., also known as Ping An, announced the coordination of its subsidiaries which include Property & Casualty insurance (P&C) and Life and Health insurance (Life & Health). Ping An is listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange (HKEX: 2318/82318) and the Shanghai Stock Exchange (SSE: 601318).

data.title: Global Times: China's top political advisory body starts annual session
data.description: On March 5, 2026, the annual session of the Chinese People's Political Consultative Conference (CPPCC) National Committee commenced in Beijing, according to a report by Xinhua News Agency. This event marks the gathering of China's primary political advisory body. President Xi Jinping presided over the proceedings in the capital city.

data.title: Nasdaq Surges Over 1%: Investor Sentiment Improves, But Greed Index Remains In 'Fear' Zone
data.description: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index indicated a slight decrease in overall fear, remaining in the "Fear" zone on Wednesday. U.S. stocks saw gains, with the Nasdaq Composite rising over 1% amid reports of potential U.S.-Iran diplomatic discussions. A premarket headline from the New York Times sparked optimism about diplomatic dialogue between the two nations. Abercrombie & Fitch Co. (NYSE: ANF) shares dropped 4% after reporting fourth-quarter earnings. Conversely, Latham Group Inc. (NASDAQ: SWIM) experienced a 12% surge following strong fourth-quarter financial results and above-estimate FY26 sales guidance. Additionally, U.S. private businesses added 63,000 jobs. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: ZEELOOL Launches 2026 Spring Event for Trendy Glasses
data.description: In Austin, Texas on March 5, 2026, ZEELOOL, a top eyewear online retailer, unveiled their much-awaited 2026 Spring Event running from February 27 to April 1. Offering a wide range of items priced under $66, customers can take advantage of this opportunity to refresh their eyewear collection.

data.title: Inbank publishes audited Annual Report for 2025
data.description: The Annual Report for 2025 has been released and can now be accessed on the Inbank investor relations website at https://inbank.eu/investors/reporting. The audited results in the Annual Report are consistent with the unaudited Interim Report disclosed on 26 February 2026. No discrepancies were found in the comparison between the two reports.

data.title: UMC Reports Sales for February 2026
data.description: In Taipei, Taiwan, United Microelectronics Corporation (UMC) (NYSE: UMC; TWSE: 2303) disclosed its unaudited net sales for February 2026. The revenues for this period saw an increase compared to February 2025, with a year-on-year growth of 6.33%, totaling NT$19,345,126 (approximately $555 million). For the cumulative period of January to February 2026, UMC reported total revenues of NT$40,207,276 (around $1.15 billion), reflecting a 5.81% increase compared to the same period in 2025. These figures are all in thousands of New Taiwan Dollars (NT$). For more information on UMC, interested parties can visit their website.

data.title: Huawei Unveils the Xinghe AI Full-Scope Security Campus Solution, Reshaping Campus Security with AI
data.description: In Barcelona, Spain on March 5, 2026, Huawei introduced the Xinghe AI Full-Scope Security Campus Solution at MWC Barcelona 2026, aiming to revolutionize campus network security in the AI era. The company also revealed the launch of AirEngine Pre Wi-Fi 8 AP as their initial commercial release, signaling a new direction in Wi-Fi technology. This announcement highlights Huawei's commitment to innovating in the realm of network security and Wi-Fi connectivity.
